title: YTP - Something you might not notice unless you're local
description:
ROUND 3 OF THE MOST UNEPIC EPIC IN POOP HISTORY - GreatBritishTurd Vs. MarkieV101

As Black Mesa drives everything to the River World, things start to get very messy now that everything from Apeture Science to Country File wants a piece of the action... which piece and over what remains uncertain...

...Meanwhile, Commissar Holt and his bitch manage to find Black Mesa's Leader, Mr. Dr. PhD. FaG. Breen. The Commissar then gives the order to SPAWN MOAR OVERLORDZ!!!!11!!one! but they end up mutating into something far more terrible; the Daemon-Princess of Evil Egginess Sau'Rah'Rah'Rah'Rah'Rah'Rah'Rah'Rah'Rah'Rah'Rah'Rohn. Or Sharon for short. 

She then goes on the rampage and destroys Breen in his Steam Boat. What happens after that is a mystery as the special effects budget ran out...

Will she destroy the river world? Will Black Mesa run away with their tails between their legs like with every other disaster? Is Holt really possessed? Will this story ever be followed up? And wheres the god damn rending ponies?!?!


Clips added from:

Pride and Prejudice
Country File
Lord of the Rings
Portal
Some Random GMod vid of Breen. Whoevers it is sorry I haven't credited you properly but it is going to a good cause :P

Audio:
Dawn of War Ork
Hell March 2
StarCraft - SPAWN MORE OVERLORDS!
